description: Fun Translations is an online text-translation service offering 150+ novelty, fictional-language, dialect, and encoding translators. It provides web-based translators and paid programmatic access for apps and AI agents.
summary: Fun Translations exposes REST translation APIs (including a general API plus Braille and Star Wars subsets) and an HTTP MCP server; all documented integration surfaces use bearer-token authentication, with the MCP server also supporting x402-purchased time-scoped bearer tokens.
